emit_contains: declare function __svn_component_default(__anchor: any, props: { data: import('./$types.js').PageData; form?: import('./$types.js').ActionData; }): any;
emit_not_contains: declare function __svn_component_default(__anchor: any, props: any): any;
_note: SvelteKit route files (+page.svelte, +layout.svelte) get contextual type information for kit-injected props from ./$types.js. Upstream's svelte2tsx auto-injects this on untyped $props() destructures; our emit does the same by synthesizing an inline type from the destructured prop names and feeding it through the existing prop_type_source pipeline. This grey-box fixture asserts the synthesized default export carries PageData + ActionData so downstream consumers see the real shape instead of the permissive `any` Props.
